release_notes: New: Live Workout Session — pick an exercise and intensity, start it, and it keeps running (with a Pause/Stop notification) even if you close the app or switch to something else. Switching intensity mid-session blends into the final calorie total correctly.

Fix: Health Connect steps/sleep sync was silently failing to run even when permission was granted, due to an unreliable permission check — sync now runs reliably, shows a "Last synced"/error status in Profile, and also re-syncs when you come back to the app, not just on launch.
Fix: today's Fitness totals now respect your custom Daily Reset Time instead of always resetting at midnight.
